pattern: Walk the tree in pre-order against the target sequence; whenever the next desired value sits in the right child instead of the left, record a flip at the current node and descend right first.
hints: Pre-order always visits a node, then its left subtree, then its right, so you can match the voyage position by position as you recurse.
When the current node's value mismatches the voyage, it is impossible; when the left child's value is not the next voyage value but the right child's is, a flip at the current node is forced.

Track an index into voyage. At each node verify node.val matches voyage[index++]; if the left child exists but does not equal the next voyage value, flip here (record node.val) and recurse right-then-left, otherwise recurse left-then-right. Any mismatch aborts to [-1].

edge_inputs.description: impossible because the root mismatch cannot be fixed
a single flip at the root
left-only child cannot be flipped to match a different value

stress.description: random tree with values 1..n; voyage built by a random flip pattern so it is achievable about half the time
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    # build random tree shape over labels 1..n
    left = [None] * (n + 1)
    right = [None] * (n + 1)
    labels = list(range(1, n + 1))
    rng.shuffle(labels)
    root_label = labels[0]
    open_slots = [(root_label, 'L'), (root_label, 'R')]
    for k in range(1, n):
        child = labels[k]
        idx = rng.randrange(len(open_slots))
        parent, side = open_slots.pop(idx)
        if side == 'L':
            left[parent] = child
        else:
            right[parent] = child
        open_slots.append((child, 'L'))
        open_slots.append((child, 'R'))
    # serialize to BFS array
    out = []
    queue = [root_label]
    while queue:
        node = queue.pop(0)
        if node is None:
            out.append(None)
            continue
        out.append(node)
        if left[node] is not None or right[node] is not None:
            queue.append(left[node])
            queue.append(right[node])
    # build a voyage: random pre-order with random flip choices
    def pre(node, flip):
        if node is None:
            return
        seq.append(node)
        a, b = left[node], right[node]
        if flip:
            a, b = b, a
        pre(a, rng.random() < 0.5)
        pre(b, rng.random() < 0.5)
    seq = []
    pre(root_label, rng.random() < 0.5)
    # half the time, perturb voyage to make it impossible
    if rng.random() < 0.4 and n >= 2:
        i = rng.randrange(n)
        j = rng.randrange(n)
        seq[i], seq[j] = seq[j], seq[i]
    return [out, seq]
stress.note: voyages come from real flip patterns so achievable cases dominate, with some impossible perturbations
